  "findings": [
    "LEL, H2S, and CO fields are blank on the permit",
    "No bump-test record attached for the gas meter",
    "Atmospheric testing is incomplete and not current"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Complete atmospheric testing for LEL, H2S, and CO immediately before entry",
    "Attach today's bump-test record for the gas meter",
    "Re-verify oxygen reading within 30 minutes of entry"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.146 requires that atmospheric testing be completed and documented for all specified hazards before entry is authorized. Blank fields for LEL, H2S, and CO mean the atmosphere has not been fully characterized. The missing bump-test record undermines confidence in the meter's accuracy. Entry cannot be authorized on this permit as documented.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146(c)(5)(ii)(C)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(d)(5)(iii)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(d)(5)(vi)"
  ]
}
